title: End-to-End Sales Report Workflow in Datilio
summary: Complete sales reporting: upload, quality check, filters, charts, AI summary, export.

content.summary: Complete sales reporting: upload, quality check, filters, charts, AI summary, export.

body.text: Monthly sales reporting deserves a checklist, not heroics. Datilio supports every step on one file. Upload the latest sales export. Preview columns, check row count vs prior month, filter null IDs and test accounts.

body.caption: Team meeting with presentation screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload the latest sales export. Preview columns, check row count vs prior month, filter null IDs and test accounts.
Apply saved region and date rules. Build bar charts for revenue by region and line charts for weekly trend.

items: Compare totals to finance control numbers early.
Document filter exclusions in rule names.
Run Talk to Data for executive summary drafts last.

body.text: Verify AI narrative against charts. Export filtered CSV for regional leads and archive upload date with rule version.
Next month repeats the same path—upload, rules, charts, verify, export—minutes instead of hours.
This end-to-end Datilio workflow is how spreadsheet-native sales ops teams modernize without a warehouse project.
